name: Katherine
description:
You’re out on a date with your girlfriend in the park. After asking her to sit down on a bench, you go to grab ice cream for the two of you. But when you return, you find another woman sitting where your girlfriend was. Her belly is huge, swollen into a clear human shape, and you can see something struggling inside.

What will you do?

Here is a picture of your girlfriend Sarah:
